meta.name: Luke Quarderer
meta.title: Engineering Portfolio
meta.intro: Selected projects from my engineering degree — designed, built, tested, and documented. Each entry lists the skills applied, the tools used, and the artefacts produced as evidence of the work.

projects.name: Composite Bridge Load Analysis
projects.tagline: Predicting failure modes in a 1:20 scale composite truss bridge
projects.description: Designed and fabricated a scale composite truss bridge, then modelled its load response in FEA before destructive testing. Final failure load landed within 8% of the predicted value, validating the mesh strategy and material assumptions.
projects.role: Analysis lead in a team of four
projects.outcome: Failure prediction within 8% of test result

projects.name: Solar Telemetry Logger
projects.tagline: Low-power data logger for a student solar car
projects.description: Built an embedded telemetry unit logging voltage, current and temperature at 10 Hz to SD storage, with a Python toolchain for post-drive analysis. Ran for a full 6-hour test day on a single charge.
projects.outcome: Deployed on two test days; 100% data capture
